---
title: "About Me"
---

## Background

My name is Oliver Reece and I am an Economics and Data Science student at Lawrence University. 
Upon graduation, I look to enter into finance, specifically as an Investment Analyst or Private Equity Analyst where I can apply
and develop further the tools my courses have given while also making a real-world impact.

## Academic Interests

- Data Analysis and Data Manipulation
- Machine learning and Predictive Modeling  
- Economics & Quantitative Research
- Investment and Portfolio Management
- Financial Modelling

## Extracurricular Interests

- Snowboarding
- Mountain Biking
- Football (Soccer)
- Fencing
- Hiking
- Camping

## Contact Information

If you need to reach me, feel free to reach me at my email: [email](mailto:oliver.j.reece66@gmail.com)
or via LinkedIn: [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/oliver-reece).
